creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Hiromitsu,

there hasn't been an update on the problem report you sent [1] for quite a
while. Since the korean/baekmukfonts-{bdf,ttf} ports do not have a
maintainer any more, do you want to provide patches for updating them?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/129579
